🚀 HIRING: Data Engineer | $50–$120/hour

We’re looking for a skilled Data Engineer to join a fast-growing remote team working on cutting-edge data and AI-driven systems.

💼 Role Highlights:

100% Remote
Flexible contract
Competitive rate: $50–$120/hour

🛠 Responsibilities:

-Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines
-Transform raw data into structured, usable datasets
-Collaborate with data scientists and AI teams
-Ensure data quality, integrity, and performance
-Optimize data systems for large-scale processing

🎯 Requirements:

-Strong experience with Python and SQL
-Experience with ETL/ELT pipelines and data workflows
-Solid understanding of data modeling and warehousing
-Familiarity with tools like Pandas, PySpark, or Airflow
-Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)

➕ Nice to Have:

Exposure to AI/ML workflows or data for model training
Experience with big data tools (Spark, Hadoop)
Background in analytics or data visualization

👇 How to Apply:
Link in the first comment



#Hiring #DataEngineer #DataJobs #BigData #ETL #Python #SQL #RemoteJobs #TechHiring #HiringNow

🔥🔥🔥Hi All, Read this entire set of points, mentioned herein, which is a "Snapshot" of the Wonderful Interview, herein🔥🔥🔥.

👉🔥AI has evolved from a tool for experimentation to a non-negotiable element of business strategy, and nearly nine in 10 technologists in India say that AI is actively expected as part of their roles, said Graig Paglieri, chief executive of Randstad Digital.

👉🔥Companies are not just encouraging employees to learn AI tools — they are embedding AI adoption into performance management frameworks. This includes formal metrics tied to how effectively individuals and teams leverage AI to drive outcomes. 

👉💡🔥The focus is two fold:

👉Technical Proficiency and 
👉Role Transformation. 

👉🔥Employees are expected not only to understand AI tools but also to rethink how their jobs evolve alongside these technologies.

👉🔥Adaptability, continuous learning, and the ability to integrate AI into decision-making are fast becoming critical performance indicators. 

👉🔥The risk of professional irrelevance has increased, making upskilling an ongoing necessity rather than a one-time effort.

👉🔥Global Capability Centers(GCCs) in India, are increasingly choosing to build strategic, in-house capabilities rather than outsourcing critical functions, marking a notable shift from past models. This has led to sustained demand for high-quality, AI-enabled talent. At the same time, organisations are taking a more targeted approach to workforce planning.

👉🔥Flexible talent models, including contract hiring and phased onboarding, are also gaining traction as companies seek to balance risk with capability building.

👉🔥India’s position as a global talent hub continues to strengthen, with both large multinational corporations and mid-sized global firms setting up or expanding GCCs.

👉🔥 This trend is not limited to the traditional Fortune 500; increasingly, mid-cap companies are entering the market, adding to hiring momentum.

👉🔥 On the workforce side, there are notable shifts in employee expectations. Factors such as work-life balance, location preferences, and meaningful work are becoming as important as compensation, particularly among younger professionals and mid-to-senior talent. 

👉🔥Mobility across cities has reduced, and there is a growing emphasis on flexibility and purpose, signalling a structural change in how talent engages with employers.

https://lnkd.in/gMUMCg5k

🚀 HIRING: Python + Go Developer | $30–$80/hour

We’re looking for a skilled Python + Go Developer to join a high-impact remote team building scalable, modern backend systems and AI-driven applications.

💼 Role Highlights:

* 100% Remote
* Flexible contract
* Competitive rate: $30–$80/hour

🛠 Responsibilities:

* Build and maintain scalable backend systems using Python and Go
* Develop APIs and microservices for high-performance applications
* Work with databases, data modeling, and system optimization
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams on AI and data-driven projects
* Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code
* Troubleshoot, debug, and improve existing systems

🎯 Requirements:

* Strong experience with Python and Go
* Solid understanding of backend architecture and APIs
* Experience with SQL / NoSQL databases
* Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
* Experience with Git and modern development workflows
* Strong problem-solving and communication skills 

➕ Nice to Have:

* Experience with microservices and distributed systems
* Knowledge of Docker / Kubernetes
* Exposure to AI/ML systems or data-heavy applications
* Experience with FastAPI, Django, or similar frameworks

🚀 HIRING: Audio Transcription Expert | $10–$20/hour

We’re looking for detail-oriented **Audio Transcription Experts** to join a remote team working on AI-driven speech and language projects.

💼 Role Highlights:

* 100% Remote
* Flexible contract
* Competitive rate: $10–$20/hour

🛠 Responsibilities:

* Transcribe audio and video content with high accuracy
* Handle multi-speaker, complex, and multilingual audio
* Proofread and edit transcripts for clarity and consistency
* Follow strict formatting and transcription guidelines
* Meet quality and turnaround deadlines

🎯 Requirements:

* Strong listening skills and attention to detail
* Excellent grammar and writing skills
* Good typing speed and accuracy
* Experience with transcription tools is a plus
* Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

➕ Nice to Have:

* Multilingual abilities
* Experience with AI/data annotation projects
* Background in linguistics or speech processing

📌 This role focuses on converting audio into accurate text to help train AI systems and improve speech recognition models

🚀 HIRING: Data Scientist | $59–$114/hour

We’re looking for a talented Data Scientist to join a high-impact remote team working on advanced data-driven and AI-powered solutions.

* Flexible contract

* Build and deploy machine learning models

➕ Nice to Have:

* Experience with deep learning / NLP / AI systems
* Familiarity with big data tools (Spark, Hadoop)

🚀 We’re Hiring: Enterprise Sales Director (Insurance/InsureTech)  
📍 Remote / Hybrid – US East Coast (NY, NJ, PA, MA, CT)
💼 Full-time | Contract | $100K–$130K

Arivonix is an Agentic AI Platform for Real-Time Enterprise Data Management & Monetization. We empower enterprises to unlock the full potential of their data. Learn more: Arivonix AI | Agentic AI Platform
About the Role

We are seeking a sales-driven Enterprise Sales Director with 10+ years of B2B enterprise sales experience in cloud/data platforms, data warehouse, or consulting services within the Insurance/InsureTech domain.

You will:
Drive enterprise pipeline generation and outbound prospecting across insurance, finance, and healthcare.
Lead consultative discovery sessions to uncover client challenges and craft tailored solutions.
Own the full sales cycle from outreach to closing.
Build strategic relationships with executive stakeholders and deliver value-focused selling excellence.
Qualifications
✔️ 10+ years of enterprise B2B sales experience (cloud/data platforms, data warehouse solutions)
✔️ Proven track record of exceeding sales targets in complex, multi-stakeholder environments
✔️ Deep knowledge of regulatory & data challenges in Insurance/InsureTech
✔️ Strong consultative solution-selling expertise and CRM proficiency (Salesforce, Zoho)
✔️ Executive presence, negotiation skills, and ability to close high-value deals

Compensation
💰 $100,000 – $130,000 per year
📩 Email your CV to: hariharanp@arivonix.com  
📞 Phone: +1-855-562-5527 | WhatsApp: +91 9080015330

Headline: New Chapter: Senior .NET Full Stack Developer available for new challenges 🚀

✅ Expert-level .NET / C# development.
✅ Full Stack proficiency (Front-end, APIs, and Database).
✅ Years of experience navigating complex enterprise architectures.
✅ Available for Hybrid or Remote setups.

Hiring for Bangalore/Pune

Alliance Partner Mgr- Emerging Technology -IoT (IoT Exp. Must) 
Emerging Technologies are:-IoT-IoTDE-ER&D-VLSI-Semiconductor-Robotics-Industrial AI-Energy Mgmnt
Jobcode-SS-Emerging-tech Partner
Technical Skills- Partner Incubation & Management
Exp. Total experience 13-18 years, Minimum 5 years in Partner Management function
Location- Bangalore-Chennai-Pune-HYD-NCR Delhi-Mumbai


I am looking Sr/ Alliance Partner Manager -IoT who has strong expertise in Emerging Technology and drive with GTM with emerging tech partners with OEM in the space of AI, Data Ops, Robotics & Automation, Industrial AI, VLSI / Custom SoC, Energy Management & Transition, Software Defined Products, SDV, Edge Capabilities and partners that bring specific Vertical Industry domain capabilities et al
 
Role descriptions / Expectations from the Role :
Work closely with IoTDE subunits leadership ( Connected Plants, Connected Services, Digital Thread, Intelligent Products & associated Dominant Themes ) to understand their needs, evaluate ecosystem players, incubate selected partners and drive GTM with emerging tech partners in the space of AI, Data Ops, Robotics & Automation, Industrial AI, Edge Capabilities and partners that bring specific Vertical Industry domain capabilities et al
Elevate Emerging Tech Partners to the next level of maturity
Take complete responsibility for this segment of partners from contract review & execution, onboarding, competency development & GTM execution. 
 
Desired Competencies (Technical/Behavioral Competency)
Must Have:
Good communication & planning skills, Ability to think & execute strategically, Partner Management, Strong experience in IIoT & Manufacturing Industry / Domain. 
 
Good to Have:
Robotics & Automation, Industrial AI, Data Ops Platforms, VLSI / Custom SoC, Energy Management & Transition, Software Defined Products, SDV, understanding of Manufacturing Industry solutions such as MES, IIoT Platforms, Cloud Platforms


Short brief of the projects:
In this role an experienced alliance professional is expected to work closely with IoTDE subunits / solution areas to understand, evaluate, incubate and drive GTM with emerging tech partners in the space of AI, Data Ops, Robotics & Automation, Industrial AI, Edge Capabilities and partners that bring specific Vertical Industry domain capabilities et al. The candidate would bring 13-18 years of experience with at least 5 years in partner management function.

Candidate is expected to be self starter, technology enthusiast, strategic thinker with ability to operate independently

Pl share the resume with position applied for and Jobcode: on suryasingh@indusitc.com / or call me +91-9811107008

I am hiring senior Syrian developers:

Live in Damascus. 5+ years of experience. Strong English. Ready to ship with European and Gulf teams.

I moved to Damascus to build the pipeline from inside the country. 
I am here, on the ground, meeting engineers in person and opening seats on those teams one by one.

You bring the skills. I bring the clients.

Here is what I am looking for:

→ You live in Damascus. In-person matters right now — I want to meet you.
→ 5+ years of professional experience. Seniors only.
→ Very good English — Slack, calls, and code reviews every week.
→ You can show your work — real projects you have shipped and can walk through with me.

Flutter, React Native, Node, Python, Go, DevOps, AI engineering.
If you are strong, we will find you a seat.

Here is what you get:

Real contracts. Real roadmaps. Real clients who treat you as a senior engineer, because that is what you are.

A Tech Manager who handles the European client relationship so you can focus on shipping code.

Long-term placements, not one-week gigs.

And a team building the pipeline from Damascus into the companies shaping the next decade of software.

If that is you, DM me the word "Damascus" and I will send you the next step.
